subject: Outlook stuck in Working Offline
description: Send/Receive shows Working Offline; user cannot toggle back online from ribbon.

ts_steps.title: Send Receive tab
ts_steps.action: Send/Receive → Work Offline — click to disable offline mode.

ts_steps.title: Connection state
ts_steps.action: Outlook bottom status bar — click 'Disconnected' if shown; check airplane mode.

ts_steps.title: OST repair
ts_steps.action: Create new Outlook profile if toggle broken due to corrupt profile flags.

internal_information: Accidental Work Offline, Exchange unreachable, or corrupt profile. Cached mode vs online mode test.
